# Mbase Digital

Mbase Digital is a professional digital strategy, website development, SEO, AI visibility, content strategy, and automation brand.

Positioning:
Mbase Digital combines creativity, logic, research, and technical execution to build fast, useful, search-ready websites and content systems for growth-focused businesses.

Primary navigation:
- Services
- Industry
- Blog
- About Us
- Contact Us

Success metrics:
- 3.2x average ROI target for growth programs.
- 50+ companies and digital teams supported.
- 12+ years of industry experience.

Trusted by growing companies across the world:
- Finology.in
- Tokenmetrics.com
- Leadangel.com
- Aigenthix.com
- Botsfolio.com

Core services:
- SEO and AI visibility: technical SEO audits, entity and schema planning, topical authority maps, and answer-ready pages.
- High-performance websites: server-rendered Next.js development, mobile-first UX, Core Web Vitals, and conversion paths.
- Content growth systems: service page strategy, editorial workflows, content briefs, and buyer-intent content.
- Automation and integrations: CRM workflows, lead routing, reporting dashboards, analytics, and connected operations.

Industries:
- Finance and investing.
- AI and automation.
- B2B software and services.

Latest blog topics:
- Server-rendered websites for search engines and AI tools.
- Service pages that explain value clearly and convert informed buyers.
- Practical launch checklists for fast, accessible, growth-ready websites.

Website standards:
- Server-rendered or statically generated pages for crawlable content.
- Readable semantic HTML with logical headings and accessible navigation.
- Optimized WebP imagery with useful alt text and disciplined file sizes.
- Metadata, Open Graph, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, JSON-LD, and llms.txt.
- Responsive layouts for mobile scanning and desktop comparison.
